mustPass: Include a clear business-facing contact path on every primary route.
Reflect the industry's operational reality with pages for services, operations, and safety/environment.
Keep all claims about capacity, safety, permits and environmental work factual and supportable.
Use Swedish route paths and kebab-case ids throughout.
Ensure contact route includes practical contact details and form support.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Consumer-oriented marketing language that does not fit industrial procurement.
Invented certifications, permit statuses, production volumes or safety statistics.
Portfolio or testimonial structures that imply retail-style purchases.
Generic 'quality and passion' copy without operational substance.
Repeating the same trust claim across multiple sections without new information.
